Sobre nosotros LANGMAI

Proveedor de productos de papel para hornear para compradores nacionales e internacionales

LANGMAI manufactures cake cups, air fryer paper liners, paper straws, muffin cups and related paper products with various colors, sizes and styles.

A practical export story buyers can verify

For B2B independent-site trust, the founder image should support a real company narrative: factory capacity, catalog clarity, product quality and fast buyer response.

Use this page for founder notes, trade show photos, customer visits and shipment examples as they become available.

Jinhua Langmai Daily-Using Co., Ltd.

LANGMAI supplies custom cake cups, cupcake liners, air fryer paper liners, paper straws and paper party accessories for B2B buyers.

Buyer Actions

Trust

Founded in 2006. 30,000+ square meters factory capacity. 50+ elite team members. Key certificate signals: BSCI, ISO, FSC, FDA, LFGB, EUDR, BRC.
